title: pachyrhizus bulbosus
intro: Pachyrhizus bulbosus, also known as the yam daisy or Mexican turnip, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Leguminosae. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its rhizome, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The yam daisy is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, providing several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Pachyrhizus bulbosus can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
